heading: Authorization of appropriations for acquisition of additional lands
label: 266 Authorization of appropriations for acquisition of additional lands
text: For the acquisition of lands authorized in , there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary, but not more than $427,500.section 267 of this title
